description_long: This object consists of two modern apartment buildings situated on a rectangular plot with adjacent paved areas and access roads. Each building is mid-rise, featuring a boxy, rectilinear form with flat roofs and multiple stories. The facades are marked by vertical window arrangements and alternating color panels, likely representing a mix of concrete, glass, and metal. The surrounding area includes driveways, walkways, and landscaped zones, suggesting a planned residential complex. The buildings appear to have main entrances facing the central paved area, with possible balconies or extended window sections. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A pair of mid-rise, modern apartment buildings with flat roofs, vertical window patterns, and surrounding paved access areas, forming a compact residential complex.
description_view_0: Two apartment buildings with visible facades, central paved area, and adjacent access roads; both buildings' main entrances are partially visible.
description_view_1: The buildings are seen from a corner, highlighting the side facades and the layout of the access roads and walkways.
description_view_2: A rear angle shows the back sides of the buildings, with less detail on entrances but clear view of the overall site layout.
description_view_3: Side and rear facades are visible, with the access roads and landscaping more prominent; the buildings' boxy shapes are emphasized.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly pattern across the facades.
